history.text: Mongol Empire ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Yuan dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Northern Yuan appears in Mongolia's historical record.
Completion of Qing dynasty conquest ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The declaration of independence from the Qing dynasty asserted Mongolia's separate statehood.
Mongolian People's Republic established introduced a new form of state rule.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Mongolia.

worthSeeing.title: Gobi Desert:
worthSeeing.text: Vast desert of dinosaur fossils, sand dunes, and camel caravans.

worthSeeing.title: Mongolian Steppe:
worthSeeing.text: Rolling grassland homeland of the nomadic horse culture that built the largest land empire.

worthSeeing.title: Eagle Hunting Festival:
worthSeeing.text: Ancient tradition of Kazakh eagle hunters in the Altai Mountains of western Mongolia.
